Wireless debugging а¶§а·ңа¶ңа¶Ҫа·Ҡ а¶ҡа¶» а¶Үа¶ӯа·’ а¶¶а·җа·Җа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ, Shizuku а·ға·ҡа·Җа·Ҹа·Җа¶ұа·Ҡ а·ға·Ҡа·Җа¶әа¶Ӯа¶ҡа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·“а¶әа·Җ а¶Ҷа¶»а¶ёа·Ҡа¶· а¶ұа·ңа·Җа·“ а¶ӯа·’а¶¶а·’а¶ә а·„а·җа¶ҡа·’ а¶…а¶ӯа¶» а¶‘а¶ёа¶ҹа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а¶әа·ҷа¶Ҝа·”а¶ёа·Ҡ а¶ҡа·җа¶§а·’ а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·“а¶ё а¶ҡа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·’а¶әа·Ҹа¶ӯа·Ҡа¶ёа¶ҡ а¶ұа·ңа·Җа·ҡ. Shizuku а¶ұа·җа·Җа¶ӯ а¶Ҷа¶»а¶ёа·Ҡа¶· а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·“а¶ёа¶§ а¶Ӣа¶ӯа·Ҡа·ға·Ҹа·„ а¶ҡа¶»а¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұ а·Җа·’а¶ҡа¶Ҫа·Ҡа¶ҙа¶әа¶Ҝ а¶ҡа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·’а¶әа·Ҹа¶ӯа·Ҡа¶ёа¶ҡ а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·“а¶ё а·ға¶Ҫа¶ҡа·Ҹ а¶¶а¶Ҫа¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұ

Essentials Accessibility Service

This service is required for the following advanced features:

вҖў Physical Button Remapping:
Detects volume button presses even when the screen is off to trigger actions like the Flashlight.

вҖў Per-App Settings:
Monitors the currently active app to apply specific profiles for Dynamic Night Light, Notification Lighting Colors, and App Lock.

вҖў Screen Control:
Allows the app to lock the screen (e.g. via Double Tap or Widgets) and detect screen state changes.

вҖў Security:
Prevents unauthorized changes by detecting window content when the device is locked.

No input text or sensitive user data is collected or transmitted.

App freezing disables the app\'s launch activity which removes it from the app list and updates. It will prevent the app from starting at all until it\'s unfrozen which saves resources but you will need to unfreeze from here or manually re-enable.

Suspending an app used to pause the app activity and prevent background executions but with recent Android changes, it only pauses the notifications from appearing and that\'s pretty much it. But does allows you to unpause from the launcher app list as they will be still available as grayscale paused app icons.
Should work the same as the native app pause/ focus mode features.

This app is a collection of utilities that can interact deeply with your device system. Using some features might modify system settings or behavior in unexpected ways. 

You only need to grant necessary permissions which are required for selected features you are using giving you full control over the app's behavior. 

Further more, the app does not track or store any of your personal data, I don't need them... Keep to yourself safe. You can refer to the source code for more information. 

This app is fully open source and is and always will be free to use. Do not pay or install from unknown sources.
WARNING: Proceed with caution. The developer takes no responsibility for any system instability, data loss, or other issues caused by the use of this app. By proceeding, you acknowledge these risks.

Anytime you are clueless on a feature or a Quick Settings Tile on what it does and what permissions may necessary for it, just long press it and pick \'What is this?\' to learn more.
You can report bugs or find helpful guides anytime in the app settings.

Share coordinates (Dropped pin) from Google Maps to Essentials to save as a destination.

The distance shown is the direct distance to the destination, not the distance along the roads.

Take all calculations of time and distance with a grain of salt as they are not always accurate.

Set a custom screen refresh rate using Shizuku. Fixed mode locks both the minimum and peak refresh rate to one value, while range mode lets you define separate minimum and peak values. Reset clears the custom override and returns the device to its system-managed refresh behavior.
Set both minimum and peak refresh rate to the same value
Choose the lowest refresh rate the display may use
Choose the highest refresh rate the display may use
Remove the custom override and return to the system default refresh behavior
Shizuku permission required to adjust refresh rate

Lock the display to one custom refresh rate
Configure separate minimum and peak refresh rates
Clear the custom refresh rate override
